articles.title: Apple’s Prime Day Deals: MacBooks, iPads, AirPods
articles.description: Apple's Prime Day sale features discounts on popular products like MacBooks and AirPods. Don't miss out on these limited-time offers.
articles.impact: Apple's sales boost could enhance market share.

articles.title: Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 Leaks Ahead of Launch
articles.description: New leaks reveal features of the Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 ahead of Samsung's July event. Expect significant updates and changes.
articles.impact: Samsung aims to enhance smartwatch appeal.

articles.title: Ubisoft Founder Killed in Plane Crash
articles.description: Claude Guillemot, a founder of Ubisoft, died in a plane crash in western France. The gaming community mourns his loss.
articles.impact: His death impacts the gaming community deeply.

articles.title: Xbox Players Face Challenges to Play Halo Together
articles.description: PlayStation and Xbox players encounter hurdles to play Halo: Campaign Evolved together. Cross-platform play remains complicated.
articles.impact: Cross-platform play remains a significant issue.

articles.title: Key Features of iOS 27 You Should Know
articles.description: iOS 27 introduces several noteworthy features, enhancing user experience despite not being flashy. Key upgrades are worth exploring.
articles.impact: iOS 27 aims to improve overall usability.

articles.title: Apple Launches Five New Apps
articles.description: Apple unveiled five new apps last week, enhancing its software ecosystem. Four were announced at WWDC 2026, with one in beta.
articles.impact: New apps expand Apple's software offerings.

articles.title: Linux Kernel Drops strncpy API After Six Years
articles.description: Linux 7.2 has officially removed the deprecated strncpy API after extensive work. This marks a significant update for developers.
articles.impact: Linux kernel modernization continues with this change.

articles.title: Three Apple Stores Permanently Closing Today
articles.description: Apple is closing three retail stores in the U.S. today, including a unionized location. This follows previous announcements.
articles.impact: Apple's retail strategy undergoes significant changes.

articles.title: Steam Next Fest Features Unique Cannon Game
articles.description: A standout demo from Steam Next Fest involves loading a cannon, showcasing creativity despite an overall disappointing event.
articles.impact: Creative demos can shine amid mediocrity.

articles.title: Only Four Useful Android Auto Apps for Road Trips
articles.description: After testing ten Android Auto apps, only four proved genuinely useful for road trips. Many apps cluttered the interface.

articles.title: Sony Plans to Boost PS Plus Profits
articles.description: Sony aims to improve PS Plus profitability by enhancing its service offerings. The gaming division achieved record profits last fiscal year.
articles.impact: Sony seeks to strengthen its gaming revenue.

articles.title: Doom Composer Bobby Prince Passes Away at 81
articles.description: Bobby Prince, renowned for his iconic Doom soundtrack, has died at age 81. His contributions to gaming music are celebrated.
articles.impact: His music left a lasting impact on gaming.

articles.title: Switching to Roku's New Home Screen
articles.description: Roku introduces a new home screen for its devices, allowing users to switch ahead of the automatic rollout. This update enhances user experience.
articles.impact: Roku enhances user interface with new design.

articles.title: Android 17 Causes 5G Issues for Pixel Users
articles.description: Pixel users report losing 5G connectivity after updating to Android 17. Ongoing issues are causing frustration among users.
articles.impact: Android updates can disrupt user connectivity.

articles.title: Gears of War: E-Day Boosts Franchise Popularity
articles.description: Gears of War: E-Day's summer release has doubled the franchise's audience, thanks to its recent Xbox exclusivity.
